channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Garden and other rubbish dumped, 24th June
item.description:
Has been here for at least a few days. Many bags of branches. And a head board. Thanks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 8, Buttermere Road, St Paul's Cray, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocking fire access and driveway, 24th June
item.description:
4 garages blocked and emergency access
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kyverdale Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffitti, 24th June
item.description:
Graffitti on the side of the dark grey outbuilding behind the Victoria pub
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Fenton Close, Hackney, London

item.title: In front of Starbucks on Hartland Road, 24th June
item.description:
Spilled paint can on Hartland Road in front of Starbucks

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hartland Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag

item.title: Refurbishment trash in usual place, 24th June
item.description:
Residents consistently dump rubbish in the alley by this block of flats

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lynton Road, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on road name plate, 24th June
item.description:
Cray Road name plate covered in graffiti and not legible.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cray Road, North Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Grass verge is over grown, 24th June
item.description:
The grass verge at the end of the Cameron Road has not been cut in several months. This is causing a health and safety hazard as emergency vehicles cannot reach the 8 bungalows that are situated next to it. There multiple large weeds and thistles growing in the area. There has been no notification from the council about this area so the grass cutting must have been missed.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 67, Cameron Road, Hayes, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bin missing, 24th June
item.description:
Bin has been removed or stolen. I reported this and was told it was sorted. It’s still missing and the alleyway is still full of rubbish

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Southwold Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car Speed limit, 24th June
item.description:
Hello, There are constantly vehicles speeding along Amhurst Road. The first half of the road has speed bumps, but the second half, leading towards Hackney Downs Station, does not. Could you please consider installing additional speed bump on this section
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Amhurst Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: CCTV for Low Traffic Neighbourhood Enforcement

item.title: Castro street car park, 24th June
item.description:
The fly tipping which keeps growing as people keep dumping things.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 182, Sumner Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fridges, wardrobes and multiple beds flytipped, 24th June
item.description:
They’re in the car park and blocking the bin cupboard.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): John Ruskin Street, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A large recycling was removed from nearby estate and used for roofing material, 24th June
item.description:
The large bin was left outside of the main gates to the Bermondsey and Rotherhithe Allotments, blocking the entrance
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Esmeralda Road, Bermondsey, Greater London

item.title: Left for weeks, dented, flat tyres and becoming filty, 24th June
item.description:
The van appears to have been dumped and is now obstructing water maintenance work

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Shooters Hill, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pot holes in road and around man hole cover, 24th June
item.description:
Road service is very uneven and the road is breaking away from manhole cover

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 26, East Dulwich Grove, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pot holes throughout this stretch of road, 24th June
item.description:
Been there for quite a while yet still hasnt been fixed , council came over a month ago but hasn’t fixed it
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ward Avenue, Little Thurrock, Grays
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pond is extremely dirty, unsafe for the birds and fish, 24th June
item.description:
I walk past the pond every morning and it's getting sadder each day. The amount of rubbish that is in the pond is disgusting. Today I saw a duck eating plastic and a dead fish floating. Heart breaking to see the animals living like this. Can we fix this?
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Clapton Common, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on green cabinet, 24th June
item.description:
Graffiti on green cabinet

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 198, Dunstan's Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large amount of dog foul., 24th June
item.description:
I reported this yesterday and they have put stencils up the road a bit but not outside my house and the 2 dog foulings are still there side 199 /201 gipsy Road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gipsy Road, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
